select `mw`.`id`, `mw`.`user_id`, `mw`.`pt_coins`, `mw`.`pt_value`, `mw`.`wallet_status`, `mw`.`created_at`, `o`.`id` as `order_id`, `p`.`name` as `product_name`, `wallet_user`.`name` as `wallet_name`, `ref1`.`name` as `level1_name`, `ref2`.`name` as `level2_name`, `ref3`.`name` as `level3_name`, `ref4`.`name` as `level4_name`, `ref5`.`name` as `level5_name`, `ref6`.`name` as `level6_name`, `pmp`.`level0`, `pmp`.`level1`, `pmp`.`level2`, `pmp`.`level3`, `pmp`.`level4`, `pmp`.`level5`, `pmp`.`level6` from `mlm_wallet` as `mw` left join `users` as `wallet_user` on `wallet_user`.`id` = `mw`.`user_id` left join `users` as `ref1` on `ref1`.`referred_by` = `wallet_user`.`id` left join `users` as `ref2` on `ref2`.`referred_by` = `ref1`.`id` left join `users` as `ref3` on `ref3`.`referred_by` = `ref2`.`id` left join `users` as `ref4` on `ref4`.`referred_by` = `ref3`.`id` left join `users` as `ref5` on `ref5`.`referred_by` = `ref4`.`id` left join `users` as `ref6` on `ref6`.`referred_by` = `ref5`.`id` left join `orders` as `o` on `o`.`user_id` = `wallet_user`.`id` or `o`.`user_id` = `ref1`.`id` or `o`.`user_id` = `ref2`.`id` or `o`.`user_id` = `ref3`.`id` or `o`.`user_id` = `ref4`.`id` or `o`.`user_id` = `ref5`.`id` or `o`.`user_id` = `ref6`.`id` left join `order_details` as `od` on `od`.`order_id` = `o`.`id` left join `products` as `p` on `p`.`id` = `od`.`product_id` left join `product_mlm_prize` as `pmp` on `pmp`.`product_id` = `p`.`id` where `mw`.`user_id` = 26 order by `mw`.`id` desc

select count(*) as aggregate from `wishlists` where `user_id` = 26 and `product_id` in (select `id` from `products` where `approved` = '1' and `published` = 1 and `wholesale_product` = 0 and `auction_product` = 0 and (`added_by` = 'admin' or (`user_id` in (4, 5, 6, 7, 21, 47))))

select * from `categories` where `level` = 0 order by `order_level` desc

select * from `uploads` where `uploads`.`id` in (32, 159, 160, 161, 162, 163) and `uploads`.`deleted_at` is null

select * from `last_viewed_products` where `user_id` = 26 and `product_id` in (select `id` from `products` where `approved` = '1' and `published` = 1 and `wholesale_product` = 0 and `auction_product` = 0 and (`added_by` = 'admin' or (`user_id` in (4, 5, 6, 7, 21, 47)))) order by `updated_at` desc
select * from `uploads` where `uploads`.`id` = '209' and `uploads`.`deleted_at` is null limit 1
select count(*) as aggregate from `tickets` where `client_viewed` = 0 and `user_id` = 26
select * from `custom_alerts` where `status` = 1 order by `id` desc
select exists(select * from `order_details` where 0 = 1 and `delivery_status` = 'delivered' and `reviewed` = 0) as `exists`
select * from `dynamic_popups` where `status` = 1 order by `id` asc
select * from `uploads` where `uploads`.`id` = '204' and `uploads`.`deleted_at` is null limit 1
